name: Cohere
description: Enterprise AI platform for NLP and embeddings. Monitor API access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Cohere Dashboard at https://dashboard.cohere.com
2. Navigate to API Keys
3. Click 'Create Trial Key' or use an existing production key
4. Copy and paste the key below

checks.name: Cohere App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Cohere API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: Cohere Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Cohere via API.
